metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for one-combo burst, online around minute 26 — about 720 damage in one combo in the sim.
Strongest meta core for one-combo burst, online around minute 26 — about 770 damage in one combo in the sim.
Strongest meta core for lifesteal sustain, online around minute 26 — about 365 HP drained back over a 10s fight in the sim.

matchups.gameplan: Survive the early checkpoints, concede even trades, and take over once your spike lands. Sparrow ramps on auto-attacks — pressure their positioning before they itemize, and armor blunts them later.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Viper: their 3s all-in loses 36% of its bite; you give up 39% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel. Murdock deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Viper: their 3s all-in loses 24% of its bite; you give up 39% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel. Renna's main threat is Mortal Coil; bait it before you commit, and mixed resist softens the trade.
